src: Well we were lucky in that we've been able to do, have a, a very good relationship with a company called well known in the marine side and they put in forty five thousand pounds into er the scheme and promised that before Christmas and that was reading the paper one day in November the, the Robert the National Heritage Minister saying that they may be, may, if you're lucky, going to put some money into sport and er so we contacted them and we were one of the first sports to get, had money doubled as they say in the bingo hall, so we er we now have ninety, ninety thousand pounds and which I wh has been distributed or will be distributed in the, in the following way so that's how we're gonna spend it and er these er, the administration represent we were basically overwhelmed with enquiries and s we employed a person in order to, to do it, the normal R Y A staff had already got enough on so we hired a girl called Sara who answers all the queries on the Year of Youth Hotline and erm we are also running the boat shows, the four or five N B L challenge which is the flagship event for our sponsors which is er I won't go into the, the details but is a, a talent fight, talent spotting event for under sixteen year olds around the country and it provided fleet of dinghies, the prize for which is a dinghy which is not, not a bad prize I think you'll agree.

src: Courageous in tackling the over-spending bogey that did such havoc in 1987, it nevertheless opened the floodgates to a fortnight of ‘we can give away more tax than you’, and exchanges between the two parties of a staggering triviality that effectively supplanted any wider debate about the economy.

src: In the cave itself, bas-reliefs sculpted close together on a stalagmite cone, hard to distinguish for the most part, except for an obvious and memorable reindeer some three feet long, in the museum, animals graphically carved or engraved on bone, many of them heads of horses, but fish too, and pieces of bone, antler and ivory carved quite elaborately into abstract patterns of diamond shapes, chevrons or spirals.

src: Hard on the heels of an Amon Ra disc of music for mandolin comes this much cheaper Tuxedo reissue (1978 recordings) of more modern repertoire for the instrument; they share only two Mozart settings for voice (in this recording that of the estimable Kurt Equiluz) and mandolin, here with the rather shy obbligato lute (as far as my ears can detect).

src: Only Sinead O'Connor would have the courage, the reckless spirit, to tackle songs made famous by the greatest singers — Ella Fitzgerald, Billie Holiday, Peggy Lee — to sing them live in front of a 47-piece orchestra, then confront organised religion and blame it for child abuse, and damn the consequences.

mt: Pandora, Yunan mitolojisindeki ilk kadın -Hesiod tarafından tarif edildiği gibi- topraktan yaratılmıştır; Zeus'un emriyle ilahi intikamın aracı olmak için kilden biçimlendirilmiştir.

src: This is also partly the reason why in Adorno's theory music in a sense assumes too much autonomy, so much as to create a danger of a relapse into idealism.
mt: Bu da kısmen Adorno'nun teorisinde müziğin bir anlamda idealizme geri dönüş tehlikesi yaratmak için çok fazla özerklik almasının nedenidir.

src: I thought so, I mean it was getting late.
mt: Sanırım öyleydi, yani geç oluyordu.

src: It is important to be able to recover composure after stress, to forget the low turn, and to continue making a good landing.
mt: Stresten sonra sakinliği geri kazanmak, düşük dönüşü unutmak ve iyi bir iniş yapmaya devam etmek önemlidir.

src: I haven't got time to plan it, I'd better start it.
mt: Planlamaya vaktim yok, başlasam iyi olur.

src: He declared on television that "Poland's painful but necessary programme of recovering from economic catastrophe can only be realized with the understanding of the majority of the nation" and that "the country had made its choice".
mt: Televizyonda yaptığı açıklamada, "Polonya'nın ekonomik felaketten kurtulmak için acı verici fakat gerekli programının ancak ulusun çoğunluğunun anlayışı ile gerçekleştirilebileceğini" ve "ülkenin seçimini yaptığını" söyledi.
